description: Conformance vectors for anchoring-precedence-ref-v1. Five invariants are separately recomputable: canonical_envelope, admission_invariant, anchoring_existence, anchoring_precedence, chain_invariant. A verifier that only checks existence without precedence will silently pass the two critical negative vectors (existence_only_anchor, late_commitment).
precedence_rule: anchor_block_time * 1000 < outcome_ts_ms (strict). Equality is not conformant.

vectors.description: Production trail b4377bcd. on-chain Arbitrum anchor at block_time 1782677381 (Unix s), outcome at 1782677980000 ms. Margin 599s. All five invariants pass.

CRITICAL: anchor externally confirmed (anchoring_existence passes), but anchor_block_time * 1000 = 1782678100000 > outcome_ts_ms = 1782677980000. A verifier that only checks existence will silently accept this. anchoring_precedence fails.
CRITICAL: anchor externally confirmed 1h after outcome. anchoring_existence passes, anchoring_precedence fails. A lazy verifier checking only existence will silently pass this.

Internal ordering chain is valid (chain_invariant passes), but anchor_block_time is null — no external commitment exists. anchoring_existence fails. The internal order cannot substitute for an external anchor.
vectors.failure_detail: anchor_block_time is null — no external commitment. Internal ordering is not a valid mechanism for anchoring_existence.

vectors.description: anchor_block_time precedes outcome (anchoring_precedence passes), but the admitting signer resolves to the actor/executor controller. admission_hash is SHA-256 of the actor_id string, not of the canonical envelope. admission_invariant fails.
vectors.failure_detail: admission_hash b1254ee2… = SHA-256('actor-controller-01') — signer resolved to actor controller, not to an independent party. canonical_envelope_hash = f391107e…
vectors.admission_hash_note: SHA-256('actor-controller-01') — signer signed the actor identity string, not the envelope

vectors.description: anchor precedes outcome, signer is independent, but admission signed a tampered envelope (extra field injected). admission_hash does not match canonical_envelope_hash. verdict_binding_failed.
vectors.failure_detail: canonical_envelope_hash=59cf14da… but admission signed 95f75353… (envelope with injected extra_field). Bytes diverge — binding fails.
vectors.admission_hash_note: SHA-256(JCS(envelope + {extra_field: 'injected'})) — signer signed a mutated envelope
